name: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed due dates. We automatically generate vendor payment schedules instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Managing vendor payment schedules manually leads to missed due dates.
features: manual entry option for unique invoices

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Managing vendor payment schedules manually leads to missed due dates.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed due dates. We automatically generate vendor payment schedules instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of payment schedules using spreadsheets
must_have_features: manual entry option for unique invoices

one_liner: For procurement managers in small to medium-sized accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed due dates. We automatically generate vendor payment schedules instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
